ljdkj vf/klwpuk la[;k dk-vk- 1097¼v½] rkjh[k 24 vizSy] 2015 dks ,rn~}kjk fujLr djrh gSA [Qk- la- Hkkjkjkizk@lhvks@13&14@f”koukFk iqy ¼uan?kkV½] nf{krk nkl] la;qDr lfpo MINISTRY OF ROAD TRANSPORT AND HIGHWAYS NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 31st August, 2016 S.O. 2820(E).—In exercise of the powers conferred by section 7 of the National Highways Act, 1956 (48 of 1956), read with Rule 3 of the National Highways Fee (Determination of Rates and Collection) Rules, 2008 published vide G.S.R. 838(E) dated 5th December, 2008 and its amendments, the Central Government by notification number S.O. 1097(E), dated 24th April, 2015 of the Government of India has authorized -- 1 of 2 -- 2 THE GAZETTE OF INDIA : EXTRAORDINARY [PART II—SEC. 3(ii)] National Highways Authority of India to collect fee on mechanical vehicles for the use of 2 lane bridge at Nandghat across Shivnath river at km. 66/2-8 of National Highway No. 200 in the State of Chhattisgarh (hereinafter referred to as the “said section”). Now, in exercise of the powers conferred by section 7 of the National Highways Act, 1956 (48 of 1956), read with Rule 3 of the National Highways Fee (Determination of Rates and Collection) Rules, 2008, the Central Government hereby rescinds the notification number S.O. 1097(E) dated 24th April, 2015. [F. No. NHAI/ CO / 13-14/ Shivnath Bridge (Nandghat)] DAKSHITA DAS, Jt. Secy. Uploaded by Dte. of Printing at Government of India Press, Ring Road, Mayapuri, New Delhi-110064 and Published by the Controller of Publications, Delhi-110054. -- 2 of 2 --
